signals.headline: SCOTUS Sports Event Contract Case Acceptance | NO (37% YES odds on Dec 31) | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
SCOTUS Sports Event Contract Case Acceptance | NO (37% YES odds on Dec 31) | MED confidence**  
Polymarket's top trending market assigns a 37% probability to the Supreme Court accepting a sports event contract case by December 31, 2026, amid $3.3M volume across 168 Trending Markets; traders view this as the most active, signaling crowd skepticism on near-term action.[1]
